thoughts_auth_middleware_563565029127.content: When a route is wrapped with withAuth HOC, the handler is never called with user=null. Any `if (!user)` guards are dead code and should be removed.

conventions_auth_563566288149.content: The codebase uses withAuth HOC (src/auth/withAuth.ts) to protect routes, not inline middleware. All protected routes under src/app/api/* must be wrapped.

facts_route_protection_563567495069.content: Always check existing routes before planning route-level changes — routes may already be protected by existing wrappers, making the task only about cleanup.
